description: Wazuh OCSF SOC – full visibility: overview, agents, rules, MITRE ATT&CK, compliance, alert search.
title: Wazuh OCSF SOC

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY device_name
list.label: Agent
list.name: device_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY device_name

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT severity FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY severity
list.label: Severity
list.name: severity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT severity FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY severity

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT class_name FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY class_name
list.label: OCSF Class
list.name: class_name
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT class_name FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') ORDER BY class_name

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS "Total Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND severity IN (${severity:singlequote}) AND class_name IN (${class_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level}
SELECT count() AS "Critical" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND wazuh_rule_level >= 13 AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT count() AS "High" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 10 AND 12 AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT count() AS "Medium" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 7 AND 9 AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
SELECT uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level}
SELECT max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT uniq(attack_id) AS "MITRE" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND attack_id != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})

panels.title: Alert Volume Over Time by Severity Level

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, countIf(wazuh_rule_level>=13) AS "Critical", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 10 AND 12) AS "High", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 7 AND 9) AS "Medium", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 4 AND 6) AS "Low", countIf(wazuh_rule_level < 4) AS "Informational" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND class_name IN (${class_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT multiIf(wazuh_rule_level>=13,'Critical',wazuh_rule_level>=10,'High',wazuh_rule_level>=7,'Medium',wazuh_rule_level>=4,'Low','Informational') AS "Severity", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY Severity ORDER BY Events DESC

SELECT class_name AS "Class", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY class_name ORDER BY Events DESC

SELECT device_name AS "Agent", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY device_name ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT attack_tactic AS "Tactic", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND attack_tactic != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY attack_tactic ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT finding_uid AS "Rule ID", finding_title AS "Description", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Level", count() AS "Hits", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY finding_uid, finding_title ORDER BY Hits DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT src_ip AS "Source IP", count() AS "Events", uniq(device_name) AS "Targets", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Lvl" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_ip != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY src_ip ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT actor_user AS "User", count() AS "Events", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Lvl" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND actor_user != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY actor_user ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT device_name AS "Agent", manager_name AS "Manager", count() AS "Events", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level", countIf(wazuh_rule_level>=13) AS "Critical", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 10 AND 12) AS "High", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 7 AND 9) AS "Medium", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Unique Rules", uniq(class_name) AS "OCSF Classes", uniq(attack_id) AS "MITRE IDs", max(time) AS "Last Seen" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY device_name, manager_name ORDER BY Events DESC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, device_name, count() AS events FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (SELECT device_name FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY device_name ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10) GROUP BY time, device_name ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT device_name AS "Agent", countIf(wazuh_rule_level>=13) AS "Critical", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 10 AND 12) AS "High", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 7 AND 9) AS "Medium", countIf(wazuh_rule_level < 7) AS "Low" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) GROUP BY device_name ORDER BY (Critical + High) DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT finding_uid AS "Rule ID", finding_title AS "Rule Description", count() AS "Hits", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents", max(wazuh_fired_times) AS "Max Fired", decoder_name AS "Decoder", attack_tactic AS "Tactic", max(time) AS "Last Seen" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND severity IN (${severity:singlequote}) AND class_name IN (${class_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY finding_uid, finding_title, decoder_name, attack_tactic ORDER BY Hits DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, countIf(wazuh_rule_level>=13) AS "Critical", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 10 AND 12) AS "High", countIf(wazuh_rule_level BETWEEN 7 AND 9) AS "Medium" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT finding_types AS "Rule Groups", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND finding_types != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY finding_types ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT decoder_name AS "Decoder", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND decoder_name != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY decoder_name ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT toStartOfMinute(time) AS time, count() AS "Alerts/min" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT attack_tactic AS "Tactic", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND attack_tactic != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY attack_tactic ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT attack_id AS "Technique ID", attack_technique AS "Technique", attack_tactic AS "Tactic", count() AS "Hits", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND attack_id != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY attack_id, attack_technique, attack_tactic ORDER BY Hits DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, attack_tactic AS tactic, count() AS events FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND attack_tactic != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY time, tactic ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT uniq(pci_dss) AS "PCI DSS" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND pci_dss != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT uniq(gdpr) AS "GDPR" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND gdpr != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT uniq(hipaa) AS "HIPAA" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND hipaa != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})
SELECT uniq(nist_800_53) AS "NIST" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND nist_800_53 != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote})

SELECT pci_dss AS "PCI DSS Req", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND pci_dss != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY pci_dss ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT gdpr AS "GDPR Article", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND gdpr != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY gdpr ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT hipaa AS "HIPAA Section", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND hipaa != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY hipaa ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT nist_800_53 AS "NIST Control", count() AS "Events", uniq(finding_uid) AS "Rules", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND nist_800_53 != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY nist_800_53 ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT src_ip AS "Src IP", dst_ip AS "Dst IP", dst_port AS "Dst Port", count() AS "Connections", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_ip != '' AND dst_ip != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY src_ip, dst_ip, dst_port ORDER BY Connections DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT device_name AS "Agent", file_name AS "File", activity_name AS "Action", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Level", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND file_name != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY device_name, file_name, activity_name ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top Log Sources (src_location)
panels.description: src_location = Wazuh log path/location. Shows which log files/sources are generating the most events.

targets.rawSql: SELECT src_location AS "Log Source", count() AS "Events", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents", max(wazuh_rule_level) AS "Max Level", uniq(class_name) AS "OCSF Classes" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_location != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY src_location ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Decoder → Log Source Matrix
panels.description: Shows which decoder is parsing which log source. Confirms the correct decoder is firing per source.

targets.rawSql: SELECT decoder_name AS "Decoder", src_location AS "Log Source", count() AS "Events", uniq(device_name) AS "Agents", uniq(class_name) AS "OCSF Classes" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND decoder_name != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY decoder_name, src_location ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 25

SELECT src_location AS "Log Source", count() AS "Events" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_location != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) GROUP BY src_location ORDER BY Events DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT toStartOfInterval(time, INTERVAL $__interval_s SECOND) AS time, src_location, count() AS events FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_location != '' AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND src_location IN (SELECT src_location FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND src_location != '' GROUP BY src_location ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 10) GROUP BY time, src_location ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Recent Alerts — Full Detail (filterable)
panels.description: All key fields. Use column header filters. finding_uid=Rule ID, finding_types=rule groups, decoder_name=decoder, src_location=log source.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "Time", device_name AS "Agent", manager_name AS "Manager", src_location AS "Log Source", finding_uid AS "Rule ID", finding_title AS "Rule Description", wazuh_rule_level AS "Level", severity AS "Severity", class_name AS "OCSF Class", activity_name AS "Activity", decoder_name AS "Decoder", finding_types AS "Rule Groups", wazuh_fired_times AS "Fired Times", actor_user AS "User", src_ip AS "Src IP", dst_ip AS "Dst IP", dst_port AS "Dst Port", file_name AS "File", process_name AS "Process", attack_id AS "MITRE ID", attack_technique AS "Technique", attack_tactic AS "Tactic", pci_dss AS "PCI DSS", gdpr AS "GDPR", hipaa AS "HIPAA", nist_800_53 AS "NIST" FROM merge('wazuh_ocsf', '^ocsf_.+$') WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND device_name IN (${device_name:singlequote}) AND severity IN (${severity:singlequote}) AND class_name IN (${class_name:singlequote}) AND wazuh_rule_level >= ${min_level} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1000
